text: Here, surrounded by the hush of an empty and dimly lit facility, I am struck by a sense of both curiosity and unease. The stark lights and glass hint at human activity, yet their absence amplifies the void. The second room’s wall marked "R+D” hints at innovation and progress, yet the darkness makes everything feel paused, as if awaiting the return of purpose. I feel like a wanderer in someone else’s after-hours dream, my thoughts echoing in the stillness.
